N Agrawal Retd. Judge of the Supreme Court of India —Chairman (ii) Mr. Justice Nirmal Singh Retd. Judge ofthe High Court of Jammu and Kashmir —~Member 7 (iii) Mr. Justice B. N. ‘Chaturvedi Retd. Judge ofthe Delhi High Court —Member [No 5/2/2006-BM] By Order and in the Name ofthe President of lndia, S. MANOHARAN, Special Secy.
